heading: How
content:
Some Sentences using the word How?

1. How is the Weather Today?
Formal- Tharing ki Namshe khatem bay la
Informal- same

2. How are you going back home?
Formal- Lhengay Zemkha khatay chenbo nangshey la
Informal- Rang /chey khem na khatay lokshey

3. How to write? - Khatay Dri-se?

4. How to wash? - Khateb Khyu-shay?

5. How do I reach MG Marg from here?- Na ley MG Marg khatey Lep shey?

6. How do I put on the Tv? -TV di Khatey Chuk-do la? How put on

heading: Everyday Commonly Used Conversations
content: The following conversation is between Sonam and Kelsang who run into each other. Since Kelsang is elder to Sonam the conversation is in the Formal/ Respectful Version.Sonam- How are you? Lenghay Kuzu Dethang Yeka la?Kelsang- Yes, I am Fine. Thank You. Lai la. Lhem ra Yeh?Sonam - Where are you going? Khana Chembo nang- do?Kelsang- I am going back home. Nga Khim Na LoktoSonam- Where do you live? Lenghay Khana Jyupo Nang-do?Kelsang- I live in Sichey Nga Sichey na Deto- eSonam- Where are you working right now? Thatoh Lenghay Chaley Khana Nang-do Bey?Kelsang- I work in SNT Department Nga Yo SNT Leylha  na Kyapto- E.Sonam- What work do you do in Office? Lhengay Leykhung na Chaley Khan Nang-do?Kelsang- i work as an Accountant in Office Nga Leykhung na Che Fatoo Chetow ki Yoh Kyapto- ESonam - It was nice meeting you. I will see you soon Lhengay Yamti Jeydi Lepti Sem Gajey, Lapti Ra Mala Jesey- EKelsang- Drive Slowly Chipdo Khalyu KyubonaSonam- See you soon Malara Jeygey Ra.
